inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $1,559M − capex $407M ÷ ~285M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 OCF below FY2024 ($1,751M) on working-capital timing; base uses filed FY2025 owner cash, not H1 FY2026 run-rate

bear.notes: Biopharma funding slump persists; CDMO integration drag; multiple compression

base.notes: CrossLab consumables stability; LS&D mid-single-digit organic; Applied Markets flat

bull.notes: BIOVECTRA/CDMO ramp; academic and China recovery; margin expansion on mix

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Instruments and intangibles on balance sheet at amortized cost; no land/NAV mismatch (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $624M current (10-K FY2025); service contracts in CrossLab growth path

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All three reportable segments profitable at operating level (10-K FY2025 segment note)

option_scan.question: Material separate options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder; BIOVECTRA revenue in LS&D segment path, not separate terminal

growth_explanation.mechanism: Installed-base consumables and CrossLab services on instruments placed; LS&D instruments tied to biopharma and academic funding; BIOVECTRA CDMO adds contract manufacturing mix
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 MD&A segment discussion; Q2 FY2026 10-Q H1 revenue +8.5%

falsifiers.observation: Core LS&D revenue declines two consecutive fiscal years ex-M&A
Operating margin falls below 18% for two consecutive years

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
